1777270.name: The Godkiller - Chapter 1 Demo
1777270.description: The Godkiller is different than any other game you've played before. So we wanted to give you a chance to try it out for free. This demo provides the first twelve levels of the full game, which is about 10% of the overall experience. If you purchase the full game later, your Steam achievements and progress will automatically transfer to the full game. Enjoy!
1777270.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
